item.title: About Me
item.description: I am a Fellow in European Politics at the London School of Economics and Political Science’s European Institute, where I teach the courses ‘Democracy, Ideology and the European State’, ‘The Future: Political Responses to a Challenge’, and ‘European Policy-Making and International Cooperation’.

item.title: Academic Publications
item.description: Lorimer, M. and L. Herman (2023) ‘The French Presidential Election of 2022: Macron’s half-victory in a changing political landscape’, Journal of Common Market Studies, DOI 10.

item.title: Education
item.description: 2015-2019 PhD in European Studies, European Institute, London School of Economics.

item.title: Public Engagement
item.description: Blog Posts ‘Macron or Le Pen? Assessing Round 1 of France’s Presidential Election’, Blog Post, EA WorldView (April 2022)

item.title: Teaching
item.description: The Future: Political Responses to a Challenge EU481 - LSE European Institute
